name: Incomplete Filtering of Multiple Instances of Special Elements
description: The product fails to filter all instances of special elements before passing data downstream. This applies to both sequential elements appearing consecutively and non-sequential elements appearing in multiple locations within the input.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides data with multiple (sequential or non-sequential) special elements that flows through a CONTROL node performing incomplete multi-instance filtering to an EGRESS or TRANSFORM node.
